load-pdf-verify-page-count.title: Load PDF and Verify Page Count with PdfFileInfo
load-pdf-verify-page-count.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file using the PdfFileInfo facade, access the underlying Document object, and confirm successful loading by checking the page count.

check-pdf-encryption-and-apply-security.title: Check PDF Encryption and Apply Security
check-pdf-encryption-and-apply-security.description: Loads a PDF, inspects its IsEncrypted property, encrypts it with user/owner passwords when not encrypted, or decrypts it using the owner password when already encrypted.

decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password using Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt an encrypted PDF file by providing the owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

encrypt-pdf-256-aes.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES and passwords
encrypt-pdf-256-aes.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt an existing PDF using 256‑bit AES, setting user and owner passwords, and saving the protected file.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-40-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 Using a User Password
encrypt-pdf-rc4-40-user-password.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF file with the RC4‑40 algorithm, specifying user and owner passwords and applying a basic print privilege using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-privileges.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Privileges
encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-privileges.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 while applying custom document privileges such as allowing printing but disabling content modification and copying.

change-user-password-of-encrypted-pdf.title: Change User Password of Encrypted PDF
change-user-password-of-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to change the user password of an encrypted PDF while keeping the existing encryption settings using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-owner-password-pdf.title: Update Owner Password of Protected PDF
update-owner-password-pdf.description: Shows how to change the owner password of an encrypted PDF without altering the user password or existing permissions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-user-and-owner-passwords.title: Change User and Owner Passwords in PDF
change-user-and-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to change both the user and owner passwords of an existing PDF file in a single call using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

set-pdf-privilege-allow-printing-only.title: Set PDF Privilege to Allow Printing Only
set-pdf-privilege-allow-printing-only.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to enable printing while disabling copying for a PDF and save the modified document.

set-pdf-privileges-form-filling-disable-.title: Set PDF Privileges: Enable Form Filling, Disable Assembly
set-pdf-privileges-form-filling-disable-.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF security privileges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to allow form filling while disabling document assembly.

disable-copying-allow-printing-pdf.title: Disable Copying While Allowing Printing in PDF
disable-copying-allow-printing-pdf.description: Shows how to set PDF document privileges to forbid copying but keep printing enabled using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.title: Remove Usage Rights from Signed PDF
remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a signed PDF, check for extended usage rights, remove them, and save the resulting document using Aspose.Pdf.

detect-extended-usage-rights-in-pdf.title: Detect Extended Usage Rights in PDF
detect-extended-usage-rights-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfFileSignature and check whether it contains extended usage rights using the ContainsUsageRights method.

remove-usage-rights-verify.title: Remove Usage Rights and Verify Removal from PDF
remove-usage-rights-verify.description: Shows how to remove usage rights from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and confirm the removal with ContainsUsageRights.

encrypt-pdf-allow-exceptions.title: Encrypt PDF with AllowExceptions and Detailed Error Logging
encrypt-pdf-allow-exceptions.description: Demonstrates how to enable AllowExceptions on PdfFileSecurity, encrypt a PDF with user/owner passwords, and log detailed exception information when encryption fails.

modify-pdf-privileges-exception-propagat.title: Modify PDF Privileges with Exception Propagation
modify-pdf-privileges-exception-propagat.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's security privileges using Aspose.Pdf while disabling internal exception handling so that errors are thrown to the caller.

encrypt-pdf-to-memory-stream.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
encrypt-pdf-to-memory-stream.description: Creates a sample PDF, encrypts it with passwords, and saves the encrypted document to a MemoryStream for transmission.

encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.title: Encrypt PDF from Byte Array
encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity, and return the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by providing only a user password, allowing the library to generate a random owner password automatically.

apply-password-protection-to-pdf.title: Apply Password Protection to an Existing PDF
apply-password-protection-to-pdf.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, without recreating the document object.

get-pdf-encryption-algorithm.title: Get PDF Encryption Algorithm using Aspose.Pdf
get-pdf-encryption-algorithm.description: Demonstrates how to check if a PDF is encrypted and retrieve its encryption algorithm via the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

check-pdf-encryption-and-decrypt.title: Check PDF Encryption and Decrypt if Needed
check-pdf-encryption-and-decrypt.description: Shows how to determine if a PDF is encrypted with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and, when encrypted, decrypt it using PdfFileSecurity; otherwise the file is simply copied.

batch-encrypt-pdf-files.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User and Owner Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdf-files.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, applying the same user and owner passwords and saving the encrypted versions.

batch-decrypt-pdfs-owner-password.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords
batch-decrypt-pdfs-owner-password.description: Shows how to read a list of PDF files and their owner passwords from a configuration file and decrypt each PDF in bulk using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

update-pdf-user-passwords-bulk.title: Bulk Update PDF User Passwords
update-pdf-user-passwords-bulk.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and re‑encrypts each document with a standardized user password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-pdf-owner-password.title: Update PDF Owner Password While Preserving User Password
update-pdf-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over multiple PDF files and change their owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades without altering the existing user password, saving the result as a new file.

encrypt-pdf-by-filename.title: Encrypt PDF with Different CryptoAlgorithm Based on Filename
encrypt-pdf-by-filename.description: Creates a sample PDF and encrypts copies using different CryptoAlgorithm values (AES or RC4) selected by the output file name.

pdf-encryption-usage-report.title: Generate PDF Encryption Usage Report
pdf-encryption-usage-report.description: Scans a folder of PDF files, checks each document for encryption, extracts the encryption algorithm/privilege using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and writes a summary report to a text file.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-allow-print-edit.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Enable Print/Edit
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-allow-print-edit.description: Demonstrates how to combine privilege settings to allow printing and content modification, then encrypt a PDF using RC4‑128 with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decrypt-modify-pdf-asp.title: Decrypt and Modify PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-modify-pdf-asp.description: Shows how to detect an encrypted PDF, decrypt it with PdfFileSecurity, add a text fragment to the first page, and save the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-verify-decryption.title: Encrypt PDF and Verify Decryption Integrity
encrypt-pdf-verify-decryption.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords using 256‑bit AES, then decrypt it and confirm that the decrypted file matches the original by comparing SHA‑256 hashes.

encrypt-pdfs-log-processing-time.title: Encrypt PDFs and Log Processing Time
encrypt-pdfs-log-processing-time.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade while measuring and logging the time taken for each encryption.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-upload.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Upload to Cloud Storage
encrypt-pdf-aes256-upload.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with Aspose.Pdf and then upload the encrypted file to a cloud storage bucket.

decrypt-pdf-owner-password-azure-key-vau.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password from Azure Key Vault
decrypt-pdf-owner-password-azure-key-vau.description: Shows how to retrieve an owner password stored in Azure Key Vault (or a stub) and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to decrypt a protected PDF and save the unencrypted version.

encrypt-and-archive-pdf.title: Encrypt New PDFs and Archive Them
encrypt-and-archive-pdf.description: Monitors a folder for newly added PDF files, encrypts each with a password, and moves the encrypted file to a secure archive folder.

update-pdf-passwords-from-csv.title: Update PDF User and Owner Passwords from CSV
update-pdf-passwords-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file containing PDF paths and passwords, then use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to change both user and owner passwords and save the updated PDFs.

encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF provided as a stream using RC4‑40 encryption with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, returning the encrypted content as a new MemoryStream.

generate-pdf-encryption-summary.title: Generate PDF Encryption Summary CSV
generate-pdf-encryption-summary.description: Scans a folder of PDF files, determines each file's encryption status, algorithm (if detectable), and privilege configuration, and writes the results to a CSV summary file.

verify-decryption-fails-wrong-owner.title: Verify Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
verify-decryption-fails-wrong-owner.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it, then attempts to decrypt with an incorrect owner password and confirms the operation fails.
